steps.assistant_text: 16-insn USO leaf calling gl_func_00000000(arg, -1, 0) and storing pointer-deref result into a separate global. Required combining 3 IDO matching techniques: (1) 3 unique extern aliases (D_timb5_0_a/b/c, all mapped to 0x0) to break IDO &D-CSE so each lui generates a distinct reloc; (2) inline expression for the loaded value (no named local) so IDO assigns it to a $t-reg (t7) instead of $v0; (3) source-order STORE-BEFORE-JAL so IDO's scheduler hoists the store into the jal delay slot instead of spilling+reloading across the call. The store-before-jal trick is per feedback_ido_swap_stores_for_jal_delay_fill.md (single-store variant).
